data.content: Shipment review rejected on 2026-03-11. Verified that commit 63c9ce7d5059 (tagged as commit:63c9ce7d5059) is on origin/main and its help colorization is shipped, but current remote main tip 8081c3a4b74b still has a failing Changesets workflow run 22960997723 with 'There is no .changeset directory in this project'. CI and Coverage Badge pass, yet the CI/CD pipeline is not fully green, so this knot is returned to ready_for_shipment pending a successful shipment review.
